project_context.emotion: Highly professional, technical, authoritative, and elegant command center
project_context.notes: Modules live inside an existing desktop OS panel. The focus is removing visual noise, resolving color clashes, and enforcing a strict 1px grid-based technical aesthetic.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: The 'Control Room' Grid - High density, clear hierarchy, 1px optical borders defining all regions. Zero soft shadows.

sidebar_navigation.container: w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.06)] bg-[#04060d]/50 flex flex-col h-full
sidebar_navigation.group_header: px-4 py-3 text-[11px] font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-white/40
sidebar_navigation.nav_item: flex items-center px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-white/60 hover:text-white/90 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors cursor-pointer
sidebar_navigation.nav_item_active: flex items-center px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-[#c8a97e] bg-white/[0.03] border-l-2 border-[#c8a97e] transition-all

module_header.container: h-14 flex items-center justify-between px-6 border-b border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.06)] bg-[#0b0f1a]

decorative_removal.action: Remove content. Return null or empty div. It clashes with the enterprise panel aesthetic.
Remove completely or return null. Watermarks overlapping content create visual noise.
Remove completely or return null. Gradients are prohibited in this strict architectural dark mode.

state_replacements.loading: Replace amber/orange spinners with a subtle #c8a97e (gold) pulse or linear indeterminate loader matching the border.
state_replacements.error_boundary: Replace amber/orange backgrounds. Use bg-[#3f0f0f] with border-[#7f1d1d] and text-[#fca5a5]. Keep it flat and technical.

buttons.primary: bg-[rgba(200,169,126,0.1)] border border-[#c8a97e]/30 text-[#c8a97e] hover:bg-[#c8a97e] hover:text-[#04060d] transition-all px-4 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] text-white/70 hover:text-white hover:border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] transition-all px-4 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle background color shifts (rgba(255,255,255,0.02) to 0.04) and border luminosity increases.
motion_and_interaction.active: Crisp, immediate feedback. Scale down slightly (scale-95) on click.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON carefully. Do NOT use gradients, excessive blurs, or drop shadows. Rely exclusively on 1px borders (rgba(255,255,255,0.06)) to define hierarchy.
Strip out all instances of the amber/orange error and loading states. Replace them with the technical error palette or gold accent specified here.

Ensure the internal navigation (TopTabs in Culinary, Sidebar in Pastry) uses the `layout_and_spacing.sidebar_navigation` styling to unify them. They must sit cleanly within the OS panel without floating awkwardly.
Empty out TronBackdrop, CornerBrand, and SubtleBottomGlow components to instantly clean up the visual noise.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.
